infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SHIFA uses the microphone to record patient consultations and clinical video evidence.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SHIFA uses the camera to capture clinical photos and video evidence for case analysis.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SHIFA uses location to attach approximate case location for sync and outbreak mapping.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SHIFA lets you attach clinical photos, videos, and documents from this device to a patient case.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: SHIFA may save clinical evidence captured during a consultation to the device when requested.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: SHIFA Guard can relay emergency alerts to nearby SHIFA devices over Bluetooth.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: SHIFA Guard can advertise emergency alerts to nearby SHIFA devices over Bluetooth.

plugins.cameraPermission: SHIFA uses the camera to capture clinical photos and video evidence for case analysis.
plugins.microphonePermission: SHIFA uses the microphone to record patient consultations and clinical video evidence.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: SHIFA uses location to attach approximate case location for sync and outbreak mapping.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: SHIFA uses location to attach approximate case location for sync and outbreak mapping.

plugins.photosPermission: SHIFA lets you choose existing clinical photos and videos as patient evidence for AI analysis.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysPermission: Allow SHIFA to relay emergency Guard alerts to nearby SHIFA devices over Bluetooth.
